events.message: {"type":"ui_component","component":"memory_list","data":[{"title":"Love for Candies","excerpt":"I used to love candies.","created_at":1773575360075},{"title":"Gym Visit on Monday","excerpt":"I went to gym on Monday.","created_at":1773572346384},{"title":"Shivansh's Good Qualities","excerpt":"Shivansh is a good boy.","created_at":1773442147666},{"title":"Shivansh's Behavior","excerpt":"Shivansh is a bad friend.","created_at":1773442098471},{"title":"LangGraph Architecture Insight","excerpt":"Agent systems should use planner → executor → critic architecture for reliable workflows.","created_at":1773436478336},{"title":"London Solo Achievement","excerpt":"Visiting London alone at 24 made me confident I can build global products.","created_at":1773436478336},{"title":"London Trip Inspiration","excerpt":"While visiting London I reflected on building Chief of AI as a personal AI operating system.","created_at":1773436478336},{"title":"YC Startup Goal","excerpt":"My goal is to build Chief of AI into a YC-backed startup solving personal productivity with AI.","created_at":1773436478336},{"title":"AI Product Vision","excerpt":"I want Chief of AI to act like a personal Chief of Staff that manages tasks, knowledge, and decisions.","created_at":1773436478336},{"title":"London Trip Inspiration","excerpt":"While visiting London I reflected on building Chief of AI as a personal AI operating system.","created_at":1773436338229}]}
